docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-10-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-10-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIN, ALICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARDY, JOSEPH $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,600.00, PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $250.00 PER MONTH (125.00) EVERY 2 WEEKS, BEGINNING ON OCTOBER 12, 2012 AND EVERY TWO WEEKS OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HARDY, JOSEPH
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,750.00 FILED BY LIN, ALICE AS TO DEFENDANT HARDY, JOSEPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-10-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 50.00 - SERVED SEP-07-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HARDY, JOSEPH
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-10-2012 - JUDGMENT.
